title: Essential Fabric 2.0 (Origins)
description: An improved version of my previous modpack, has sane default settings and origins.
body:
This is a modpack designed to provide sane defaults for both PVP and exploration. Not for use on most servers due to it having an unrestricted minimap (by default entities are disabled though) and Origins.

It also has a lot of optimisation and performance mods, with FPS rivalling modpacks like Simply and Fabulously Optimised.

This modpack has nothing to do with the "Essential" mod.

"Sharpness 300k" texture pack is by Sharpness and Hydra, all credit goes to them.
